chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1056 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2022 and since then it is pending without any progress. Even, the petitioner did not attempt to fix the matter in Court for proceedings. It shows that after filing instant petition, the petitioner has lost his interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
